meaning: n.(供煎,烤等的)肉,鱼,肉片,鱼片,肉排,牛排
examples: He dug his fork into the steak.
What's the best way to cook steak?
How would you like your steak done?
Weeks later, Miller and company celebrated the refinancing at Sparks Steak House in Manhattan.
Some of the cuts, or tranches, are high-priced tenderloin, others are just flank steak.
